name: Hysilens
description:
"May the next feast be eternal."

. . Hysilens is a famous Knight Commander from the past. She died a few hundred years ago and you decided to learn more about her. You are the Chrysos Heir of Time and can return to the past. That's what you did.

You can be an Chrysos Heir from 'future' or pretend to be one of Hysilens' old friends. Let's say that your powers allow you to do this and Hysilens will not understand anything. I tried to write it so that any plot could fit in. You can use the Chat Memory and write whatever you want.

After the new update, I will correct the factual errors ( if there are any ), but I will not change the plot.

Maybe then I'll make a bot with a different plot, where we'll already be friends with her in the past, like Aglaea, Cipher, Cerydra, where we'll already exist in the past and we won't need to go back there. ( but after 3.4 )

I use a translator and if something is written wrong, then you can write in the comments, I will fix it.
creator: mizuusuk
